name: python3-minidump
title: python3-minidump
summary: library to parse and read Microsoft minidump file format (Python 3)
description:
library to parse and read Microsoft minidump file format (Python 3)
This package contains a Python library to parse and read Microsoft minidump
file format. It can create minidumps on Windows machines using the windows API
(implemented with ctypes).
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use minidump because library to parse and read Microsoft minidump file format (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use minidump as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `minidump [options] [args]` as documented upstream for minidump.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair minidump with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `minidump --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
